texto: I'm not cruisin' this opportunity in time and space for you to like or dislike my 'get-down'
autor: I'm here 'cause I'm down to get it right by the time I return to the 'mothaship'. I remain a work in progress.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a I'm here 'cause I'm down to get it right by the time I return to the 'mothaship'. I remain a work in progress.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “I'm not cruisin' this opportunity in time and space for you to like or dislike my 'get-down'” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, t-f-hodge, cruisin pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
